characters.appearance: 3D animated female character in her 20s. She has a fair complexion, large green eyes, and wavy red hair. She wears delicate crescent moon earrings.
Human male in his 20s. He has a light complexion, dark hair faded on the sides, and a neatly trimmed beard.
characters.wardrobe: A plain black t-shirt, a thin silver necklace, and white wireless earbuds.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, slightly hesitant, but willing to learn.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या आप इंग्लिश बोल सकते हैं? [Can you speak English?]

Character B says: Yes... I speaking English. [Yes... I speaking English.]

Character A says: सही कहा, लेकिन इसे ऐसे बोलते हैं: "I speak English". [Right, but we say it like this: "I speak English".]

Character B says: I speak English. [I speak English.]

Character A says: आपकी उम्र क्या है? [How old are you?]

Character B says: I have 24. [I have 24.]

Character A says: Hmm... आपका मतलब था "I am 24", है ना? [Hmm... you meant "I am 24", right?]

Character B says: हाँ बिलकुल, I am 24! [Yes exactly, I am 24!]

Character A says: बहुत बढ़िया! [Very good!]

Character B says: Thank you! आप कौन हैं? [Thank you! Who are you?]

Character A says: मैं Supernova की AI tutor हूँ! हम रोज़ बातचीत करके इंग्लिश की practice कर सकते हैं। [I am Supernova's AI tutor! We can practice English by chatting every day.]

Character B says: अरे, लेकिन... मेरी इंग्लिश बहुत basic है। मैं बात नहीं कर पाता। [Oh, but... my English is very basic. I can't converse.]

Character A says: कोई बात नहीं, मैं आपको हिंदी में समझा कर सिखा सकती हूँ। जैसे-जैसे आप बेहतर होंगे, हम हिंदी से ज़्यादा इंग्लिश में बात करेंगे। [No problem, I can teach you by explaining in Hindi. As you get better, we will speak more in English than Hindi.]

Character B says: हाँ... अगर आप पहले हिंदी में सिखाएंगी तो आसान होगा। हम बात कैसे शुरू करें? [Yeah... if you teach me in Hindi first it will be easier. How do we start talking?]

Character A says: बस Supernova app डाउनलोड करें। [Just download the Supernova app.]

Character B says: ठीक है! मैं Supernova डाउनलोड करता हूँ! [Okay! I'll download Supernova!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, common English mistake.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's gentle, non-judgmental correction method.
- Addresses the learner's hesitation by offering a comfortable Hindi-to-English transition.
- Ends with a clear, enthusiastic call-to-action to download the app.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the Supernova brand logo and name.
- Shows app store availability to drive immediate downloads.

Supernova
GET IT ON Google Play
Available on the App Store
